docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT HUMANA DENTAL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,775.00 FILED BY JEDEIKIN, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT HUMANA DENTAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-12-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BASED ON PLAINTIFF'S CORRESPONDENCE FILED 2/19/15. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED NOV-30-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HUMANA DENTAL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-12-2015 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO FEB-23-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY PAUL LAKKIS--REPRESENTATIVE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CORRESPONDENCE RE:REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL W/PREJUDICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF JEDEIKIN, JOSEPH
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-26-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HUMANA DENTAL
